message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor #F5F5F5
  BorderColor #333333
  ArrowColor #333333
  FontColor #333333
  FontName "Arial"
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFCC
  BorderColor #333333
  FontColor #333333
  FontName "Arial"
  FontSize 12
}
skinparam linetype ortho

package "flutter" {
  package "src" {
    package "painting" {
      package "text_style.dart" {
        class "TextStyle" as TextStyle {
          + TextStyle({
            Color? color,
            Color? backgroundColor,
            double? fontSize,
            FontWeight? fontWeight,
            FontStyle? fontStyle,
            double? letterSpacing,
            double? wordSpacing,
            TextBaseline? textBaseline,
            double? height,
            Locale? locale,
            Paint? foreground,
            Paint? background,
            List<Shadow>? shadows,
            List<FontFeature>? fontFeatures,
            TextDecoration? decoration,
            Color? decorationColor,
            TextDecorationStyle? decorationStyle,
            double? decorationThickness,
            String? debugLabel,
            String? fontFamily,
            List<String>? fontFamilyFallback,
            String? package,
            double? leadingDistribution,
            TextOverflow? overflow,
          })
          + TextStyle copyWith({
            Color? color,
            Color? backgroundColor,
            double? fontSize,
            FontWeight? fontWeight,
            FontStyle? fontStyle,
            double? letterSpacing,
            double? wordSpacing,
            TextBaseline? textBaseline,
            double? height,
            Locale? locale,
            Paint? foreground,
            Paint? background,
            List<Shadow>? shadows,
            List<FontFeature>? fontFeatures,
            TextDecoration? decoration,
            Color? decorationColor,
            TextDecorationStyle? decorationStyle,
            double? decorationThickness,
            String? debugLabel,
            String? fontFamily,
            List<String>? fontFamilyFallback,
            String? package,
            double? leadingDistribution,
            TextOverflow? overflow,
          })
          + TextStyle merge(TextStyle? other)
          + TextStyle apply({
            Color? color,
            Color? backgroundColor,
            double? fontSizeFactor,
            double? fontSizeDelta,
            int? fontWeightDelta,
            FontStyle? fontStyle,
            double? letterSpacingFactor,
            double? letterSpacingDelta,
            double? wordSpacingFactor,
            double? wordSpacingDelta,
            double? heightFactor,
            double? heightDelta,
            TextBaseline? textBaseline,
            Locale? locale,
            List<FontFeature>? fontFeatures,
            TextDecoration? decoration,
            Color? decorationColor,
            TextDecorationStyle? decorationStyle,
            double? decorationThicknessFactor,
            double? decorationThicknessDelta,
          })
          + TextStyle lerp(TextStyle? a, TextStyle? b, double t)
          + TextStyle? lerpFrom(TextStyle? a, double t)
          + TextStyle? lerpTo(TextStyle? b, double t)
          + bool operator ==(Object other)
          + int get hashCode
          + String toString()
          + TextSpan toTextSpan({String? text})
        }
      }
    }
    package "widgets" {
      package "framework.dart" {
        class "StatefulWidget" as StatefulWidget {
          + StatefulWidget({Key? key})
          + State<StatefulWidget> createState()
          + Element createElement()
          + bool operator ==(Object other)
          + int get hashCode
          + String toStringShort()
          + String toStringDeep({String prefixLineOne, String prefixOtherLines, int wrapWidth})
          + String toString({DiagnosticLevel minLevel})
          + DiagnosticPropertiesBuilder debugDescribeChildren()
          + void debugFillProperties(DiagnosticPropertiesBuilder properties)
        }
        class "State" as State {
          + State()
          + TickerProvider get vsync
          + BuildContext get context
          + Widget get widget
          + void initState()
          + void didChangeDependencies()
          + void didUpdateWidget(covariant StatefulWidget oldWidget)
          + void setState(VoidCallback fn)
          + void deactivate()
          + void dispose()
          + void reassemble()
          + void debugFillProperties(DiagnosticPropertiesBuilder properties)
          + void debugCheckInvariants()
          + void debugSetAllowIgnoredCallsToMarkNeedsBuild(bool value)
          + void markNeedsBuild()
          + void markNeedsAssemble()
          + void setInheritedWidgetDirty()
          + void didChangeAppLifecycleState(AppLifecycleState state)
          + void didHaveMemoryPressure()
          + void didChangeAccessibilityFeatures()
          + void didChangeMetrics()
          + void didChangeTextScaleFactor()
          + void didChangePlatformBrightness()
          + void didChangeLocales(List<Locale>? locales)
          + void didChangeSemanticsEnabled(bool enabled)
          + void didChangeBrightness(Brightness brightness)
          + void didChangeViewPadding(EdgeInsets padding)
          + void didChangeViewInsets(EdgeInsets insets)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsets(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsetsAndSafeArea(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets, EdgeInsets safeArea)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsetsAndSafeAreaAndSystemGestureInsets(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets, EdgeInsets safeArea, EdgeInsets systemGestureInsets)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsetsAndSafeAreaAndSystemGestureInsetsAndDisplayFeatures(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets, EdgeInsets safeArea, EdgeInsets systemGestureInsets, List<DisplayFeature> displayFeatures)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsetsAndSafeAreaAndSystemGestureInsetsAndDisplayFeaturesAndSystemNavigationBarDividerColor(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets, EdgeInsets safeArea, EdgeInsets systemGestureInsets, List<DisplayFeature> displayFeatures, Color? systemNavigationBarDividerColor)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsetsAndSafeAreaAndSystemGestureInsetsAndDisplayFeaturesAndSystemNavigationBarDividerColorAndSystemNavigationBarContrastEnforced(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets, EdgeInsets safeArea, EdgeInsets systemGestureInsets, List<DisplayFeature> displayFeatures, Color? systemNavigationBarDividerColor, bool systemNavigationBarContrastEnforced)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsetsAndSafeAreaAndSystemGestureInsetsAndDisplayFeaturesAndSystemNavigationBarDividerColorAndSystemNavigationBarContrastEnforcedAndSystemNavigationBarColor(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets, EdgeInsets safeArea, EdgeInsets systemGestureInsets, List<DisplayFeature> displayFeatures, Color? systemNavigationBarDividerColor, bool systemNavigationBarContrastEnforced, Color? systemNavigationBarColor)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsetsAndSafeAreaAndSystemGestureInsetsAndDisplayFeaturesAndSystemNavigationBarDividerColorAndSystemNavigationBarContrastEnforcedAndSystemNavigationBarColorAndStatusBarColor(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets, EdgeInsets safeArea, EdgeInsets systemGestureInsets, List<DisplayFeature> displayFeatures, Color? systemNavigationBarDividerColor, bool systemNavigationBarContrastEnforced, Color? systemNavigationBarColor, Color? statusBarColor)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsetsAndSafeAreaAndSystemGestureInsetsAndDisplayFeaturesAndSystemNavigationBarDividerColorAndSystemNavigationBarContrastEnforcedAndSystemNavigationBarColorAndStatusBarColorAndStatusBarBrightness(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets, EdgeInsets safeArea, EdgeInsets systemGestureInsets, List<DisplayFeature> displayFeatures, Color? systemNavigationBarDividerColor, bool systemNavigationBarContrastEnforced, Color? systemNavigationBarColor, Color? statusBarColor, Brightness? statusBarBrightness)
          + void didChangeViewPaddingAndInsetsAndSafeAreaAndSystemGestureInsetsAndDisplayFeaturesAndSystemNavigationBarDividerColorAndSystemNavigationBarContrastEnforcedAndSystemNavigationBarColorAndStatusBarColorAndStatusBarBrightnessAndStatusBarIconBrightness(EdgeInsets padding, EdgeInsets insets, EdgeInsets safeArea, EdgeInsets systemGestureInsets, List<DisplayFeature> displayFeatures, Color? systemNavigationBarDividerColor, bool systemNavigationBarContrastEnforced, Color? systemNavigationBarColor, Color? statusBarColor, Brightness? statusBarBrightness, Brightness? statusBarIconBrightness)
        }
        class "GlobalKey<JigsawWidgetState>" as GlobalKey {
          + GlobalKey({String? debugLabel})
          + GlobalKey.constructor({String? debugLabel})
          + GlobalKey.current({String? debugLabel})
          + GlobalKey.labeled({String debugLabel})
          + T? get currentState
          + BuildContext? get currentContext
          + Widget? get currentWidget
          + void setState(VoidCallback fn)
          + bool operator ==(Object other)
          + int get hashCode
          + String toString()
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

package "vivaoinseto_tg" {
  package "pages" {
    package "galeria.dart" {
      class "Galeria" as Galeria {
        + Galeria({Key? key})
        + State<Galeria> createState()
      }
      class "_GaleriaState" as _GaleriaState {
        + Widget build(BuildContext context)
      }
    }
    package "jogodamemoria.dart" {
      class "_JogoDaMemoriaState" as _JogoDaMemoriaState {
        + TextStyle whiteText
        + bool hideTest
        + Game _game
        + int tries
        + int score
        + void initState()
        + Widget build(BuildContext context)
      }
      class "JogoDaMemoria" as JogoDaMemoria {
        + JogoDaMemoria({Key? key})
        + State<JogoDaMemoria> createState()
      }
    }
    package "login.dart" {
      class "Login" as Login {
        + Login({Key? key})
        + State<Login> createState()
      }
      class "_LoginState" as _LoginState {
        + Widget build(BuildContext context)
      }
    }
    package "quebracabecas.dart" {
      class "QuebraCabecas" as QuebraCabecas {
        + QuebraCabecas({Key? key})
        + State<QuebraCabecas> createState()
      }
      class "_QuebraCabecasState" as _QuebraCabecasState {
        + GlobalKey<JigsawWidgetState> puzzleKey
        + Widget build(BuildContext context)
      }
    }
  }
  package "cards.dart" {
    class "Game" as Game {
      + Color hiddenCard
      + List<Color>? gameColors
      + List<String>? gameImg
      + List<Color> cards
      + String hiddenCardpath
      + List<String> cards_list
      + int cardCount
      + List<Map<int, String>> matchCheck
      + void initGame()
    }
  }
  package "dart" {
    package "ui" {
      class "Color" as Color {
        + Color(int value)
        + Color.fromRGBO(int r, int g, int b, double a)
        + Color.fromARGB(int a, int r, int g, int b)
        + Color.lerp(Color? a, Color? b, double t)
        + int get value
        + int get alpha
        + int get red
        + int get green
        + int get blue
        + double get opacity
        + Color withAlpha(int a)
        + Color withOpacity(double opacity)
        + Color withRed(int r)
        + Color withGreen(int g)
        + Color withBlue(int b)
        + bool operator ==(Object other)
        + int get hashCode
        + String toString()
      }
    }
  }
}

@enduml
```
